summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of La Băiatu' restaurant website. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working with minor interaction issue in time selector.

ui_bugs.issue: Time dropdown options not clickable via automated testing, but form can be filled using keyboard input
ui_bugs.workaround: Users can type time value directly or use keyboard navigation

passed_tests: ✅ All 16 backend API endpoints working correctly
✅ Hero section displays restaurant name 'La Băiatu'' and tagline
✅ Navbar with all 7 section links and smooth scroll navigation
✅ About section renders with restaurant description and opening hours
✅ Menu section with 7 category tabs (Toate, Ciorbe & Supe, Desert, etc.)
✅ Menu search functionality - 'papanași' filtering works
✅ Menu category switching - Desert tab shows 6 dessert items
✅ Popular dishes section renders 8 popular items
✅ Gallery section with 8 images and working lightbox
✅ Reviews section displays 8 customer reviews with ratings
✅ Contact section with address, phone, email, opening hours
✅ Google Maps iframe embedded correctly
✅ Reservation form with date picker (Calendar), time select, guest count
✅ Mobile responsive layout - mobile menu toggle works
✅ Footer renders with contact info and navigation links
✅ GET /api/menu returns 46 menu items
✅ GET /api/menu?category=desert returns 6 desserts
✅ GET /api/menu?search=papanasi returns filtered results
✅ GET /api/menu/popular returns 8 popular dishes
✅ GET /api/menu/categories returns all 7 categories
✅ GET /api/reviews returns 8 reviews
✅ GET /api/restaurant-info returns complete restaurant information
✅ POST /api/reservations creates reservation and stores in MongoDB

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major functionality working, minor interaction issue with time selector
